DataRequest.Name: Excessive file changes on a host: Potential Ransomware / SCW
DataRequest.Description: Identifies excessive non-executable file changes by the same process on a Windows host. Requires Windows Security logs or FortiSIEM Agent to be running on the host.
DataRequest.DataSource: Microsoft Windows Security Log via OMI or FortiSIEM Agent

SubPattern.name: Filter
SubPattern.SingleEvtConstr: ((eventType IN ("FINS-Windows-file-written","FINS-Windows-file-read","FINS-Windows-file-renamed") AND (fileName NOT CONTAIN ".exe" AND fileName NOT CONTAIN ".dll" AND fileName NOT CONTAIN ".cdf-ms" AND filePath NOT REGEXP "^(?i:c:\\\$extend\\\$deleted)")) OR (eventType="Win-Security-4656" AND (osObjName NOT CONTAIN ".exe" AND osObjName NOT CONTAIN ".dll" AND osObjName NOT CONTAIN ".cdf-ms" AND osObjName NOT REGEXP "^(?i:C:\\Windows)" AND osObjName NOT REGEXP "^(?i:c:\\\$extend\\\$deleted)"))) AND (shortProcName NOT IN ("vcpkg.exe","7z.exe","7za","7za.exe","7zfm.exe","7zg.exe","bunzip","bunzip2","bzip","bzip2","gunzip","gzip","peazip.exe","rar.exe","tar","tar.exe","winrar.exe","winzip.exe","zip.exe","sihost.exe","photosapp.exe","vcpkgsrv.exe","cl.exe","cppwinrt.exe","cmake.exe","perl.exe","code.exe","rg.exe"))
